SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF VICTOR A PINZON GARZON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER: FREDRICO BEHNCKE CIRTIFICATION # 301627. DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS DON DICKERSON (VICE PRESIDENT). PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINZON GARZON, VICTOR A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA FITNESS SF - FILLMORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
